reference: Hello Doctor. I woke up today only to find that half of my upper lip is swollen. I looked around for bite or sting marks but found nothing. There is no pain, only a numb and tingly feeling. I didn't eat anything the night before, so it couldn't be an allergic reaction. I applied a frozen bottle of water to it. What could this be, and how can I make the swelling go away as soon as possible?
text: Hello, doctor. I woke up today only to find that half of my upper lip is swollen. I looked around at your sting marks, but found nothing. There is no pain, only a numb and weak feeling. I didn't eat anything the night before, so it couldn't be an allergic reaction. I applied a frozen bottle of water to it. What could this be? And how can I make the swelling go away as soon as possible?
